name: persistence
description: A feature to persist userland data across containers

claude.description: Mount Claude Code config (`~/.claude`) via volume.

gemini.description: Mount Gemini Code Assist config (`~/.gemini`) and caches (`~/.cache/google-vscode-extension`, `~/.cache/cloud-code`) via volumes.

copilot-cli.description: Mount GitHub Copilot CLI config (`~/.copilot`) via volume.

gh-cli.description: Mount GitHub CLI config (`~/.config/gh`) via volume.
